code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"http://127.0.0.1:8000",timeout:120000});export const uploadPDF=async formData=>{const res=await API.post("/upload",formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});return res.data;};export const askAI=async question=>{const res=await API.get("/ask",{params:{question}});return res.data;};export const getStatus=async()=>{const res=await API.get("/status");return res.data;};
